title: Fix clunger OOM - congress stream leak

log.context: Fix clunger OOM - congress stream leak

Done. Here's what was found and fixed:

**Root cause confirmed**: `/mnt/data/clunger/src/services/congress.ts` had four stream leak patterns:

1. **`callClaude`** (Anthropic SDK): `client.messages.stream()` object was abandoned on error — the `for await` loop would throw and the stream handle was never explicitly aborted. Fixed by wrapping in `try/catch` and calling `stream.abort()` on error.

2. **`callGrok`** (OpenAI SDK, used for xAI/Grok models): Same pattern — `for await` on streaming compl...(truncated)
